description: Designed for utmost comfort, this pair of sandals from fila have all that the feet require. With cushioned, adjustable straps and multi-directional lugs on the outsole, this pair offers ample comfort and stability. This black and olive pair comes from the Eliminate-N range of fila. Pair them with casual wear like jeans, cargo pants or shorts and spend the summer in the glory of comfort in style.Uppers Synthetic suede uppers with black textile lining and bold stitch detailing for support and durability Adjustable velcro strap at forefootm midfoot and front of the ankle Back strap with soft textile lining Midsole Breathable EVA footbed for cushioning and shock resistance Embossed design of surfboard and beach along the footbed Outsole Made of lightweight Thermo Plastic Rubber (TPR) for extra durability, weather resistance and excellent abrasion resistance square lugs for stability and grip Toe guard for extra protection Wash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
